examples: In an immense caldron soup was boiling; and rabbits and hares were being roasted on a spit.
I have to find a caldron to log completely in water.
And then it would arrive, the simmering caldron of rich black bean stew with all the fixings.
Sometimes it was a matter of politeness, as in the Luberon farm restaurant where the beaming hostess set a vast caldron of lamb navarin before us.
